name: Section 645 Election for Qualified Revocable Trusts

eligibility.description: Requires a joint election by the executor and the trustee of a qualified revocable trust (grantor trust prior to death).

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Elect to treat a qualified revocable trust as part of the decedent's estate for tax purposes, allowing for a fiscal year election and a larger personal exemption.
